svg.text: Cluster-level view of every class family · spec/VERSION 2.6.0 · five bands
Band 1 · Lifecycle base — every VM derives from this
emitted on every transition · MessageHub envelope
Band 2 · VM family — 5 idioms: leaf, composite, group, aggregate, specialized
Specialized (FormVM · NotificationVM · ConfirmationVM) is rendered in Band 5 (right) — same band, separate sub-cluster.
Capability micro-interfaces · 22 opt-in contracts · CAP-001..022 · spec/14 · ADR-0010
Band 4 · Services · Messages · State · Collections · Builders · Tree
Services (DI-injected · ADR-0003) — each ships a Null* sibling per ADR-0017
Messages used as bus envelopes (Band 1) carry PropertyChanged · ConstructionStatusChanged · TreeStructureChanged (v2.1) · property_value_changed_messages_for helper.
Band 5 · Specialized VMs + Notification rendering (opt-in sub-package)

Notifications sub-package distributes separately: vmx.notifications · VMx.Notifications · @thekaveh/vmx/notifications. The render-side VMs reside conceptually in Band 2 but ship from this sub-package alongside their primitives + hub.
composition / has-a · bridges Confirmation → ConfirmationDecoratorCommand (Band 3 ↔ Band 5).
FormVM is a specialized Composite (Band 2 family) with snapshot/revert state — placed here to keep the "specialized" cluster contiguous.
